name: Bacterial Electroporation

components.name: 1. 冰上解冻电转感受态细胞 (10 min)
7. 涂板 (含抗生素 LB 平板)

notes.en: High-efficiency transformation (10⁹–10¹⁰ CFU/µg). 10–100× more efficient than chemical transformation. DNA must be desalted (salt causes arcing). Essential for large plasmids (>10 kb) and library construction. Pulse: 1.8 kV, 25 µF, 200 Ω.
notes.zh: 高效转化 (10⁹–10¹⁰ CFU/µg)。DNA 必须脱盐，否则放电弧光。时间常数应为 4–5 ms。适用于大质粒 (>10 kb) 和文库构建。

ref: Dower et al. (1988) Nucleic Acids Res 16:6127–6145; Sambrook & Russell (2001)
